user_query: I just checked my spending and I'm way over budget. Cut the expensive dinners from the itinerary and I'll find cheaper alternatives later.
nodes_to_delete: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 2 > Alo Restaurant
Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 1 > Canoe Restaurant
reasoning: Removed the two clearly high-cost evening dinners (Alo on Day 2 and Canoe on Day 1). Excluded other restaurants: Antler Kitchen (Day 8) is moderate-priced (CAD 80-100) and less clearly 'expensive', Elements on the Falls is a midday lunch, and The Keg (Day 6) is mid-range/family-friendly (CAD 60-80), so they were not removed to avoid over-deleting.
